creator: steve@mouf.net
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

FYI, I've been sitting on this because it breaks rubygem-actionpack,
which only works with sprockets 2.0.x. I think they intentionally
moved this back because they had issues with sprockets 2.1.x. It will
have to wait until rubygem-actionpack can work with it, otherwise we'd
break rubygem-rails.

Steve

PS. Sorry for the slow response.
